title: Blood God
content:
Blood God
 is the current ruler of 
Yao Family
. He has been possessed by an 
Ancient Demon
.

History
[
]

Under the possession of the Ancient Demon, Blood God poured the 
ancient lamp
's weakened-spirit into his daughter's body and then refined his granddaughter, 
Yao Mengyun
, into the ancient lamp's spirit.

He also poured a demon-ling inside 
Yao Yun
, his younger son, to control him after he tried to rebel and save his two nieces, Yao Mengyun and 
Yao Bingyun
.

His eldest son, 
Blood Ancestor
's father, escaped to the 
Alliance Star System
 soon after he learnt that his father has been possessed by an Ancient Demon.

Many years later, when Wang Lin returns from the Outer realm, Wang Lin comes to resolve the feud between them, even though he was under the protection of 
Master Lu Fu
, he still perishes under the hand of Wang Lin, forcing the 6 stars of the Ancient Demon hidding in his body to appear, Wang Lin captures the latter.
